name: Medco Health Solutions, Inc.
description: Medco Health Solutions, Inc. was a prominent American pharmacy benefit management (PBM) company that provided comprehensive pharmacy services to private and public employers, health plans, labor unions, government agencies, and individuals. Headquartered in Franklin Lakes, New Jersey, the company specialized in managing prescription drug benefits, operating large-scale mail-order pharmacies, and offering cost-management and patient-care services. Medco was a publicly traded entity on the NYSE under the ticker MHS until it was acquired by Express Scripts in 2012, effectively ending its operations as an independent company.
